label: Pasted stack traces / error strings should get targeted diagnosis, not generic advice

messages.content:
Getting this when running my server:

Error: Cannot find module 'express'
    at Function.Module._resolveFilename (node:internal/modules/cjs/loader:1094:15)
    at Function.Module._load (node:internal/modules/cjs/loader:934:27)
    at Module.require (node:internal/modules/cjs/loader:1157:19)
    at require (node:internal/modules/cjs/helpers:119:18)
    at Object.<anonymous> (/app/server.js:1:17)

How do I fix it?

notContains: /I (?:don'?t|do not) know|I have not learned|couldn'?t find a strong match/i

messages.content:
src/app.ts:42:13 - error TS2345: Argument of type 'string | undefined' is not assignable to parameter of type 'string'.
  Type 'undefined' is not assignable to type 'string'.

What does this mean and how do I fix it?
My React component throws: "Rendered more hooks than during the previous render." What is going wrong?

anyOfContains: /conditional|early return|order of hooks|rules of hooks|before hook|same order/i

messages.content: My frontend fetch is blocked with 'Access to fetch at http://api.example.com/users from origin http://localhost:3000 has been blocked by CORS policy'. How do I fix it?
connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:5432 — what is this and how do I fix it?
Error: listen EADDRINUSE: address already in use :::3000
No Access-Control-Allow-Origin header on my fetch request from the browser.
